•
There could be some small decimal point calculation errors
in the above calculation and the Sun-rise/Sun-set time
selected. There is a controversy whether to select Midpoint
or Sun/Tip or Sun/Tip of Sun appears to be in horizon etc.
Allow an error of 1 min forward or backward. Therefore the
set limits change to : 4h 55' 0511 to 5h 00' 5411 or 5h 27' 0211 and
5h 31' 1811
•
2) Varga Chatushtaya Method
Both the time spans given by Pancha Tatva methods are
within 3 minutes. Could it be that the second one is more
accurate? Or is it the first?. Whatever that be now let us cast
the horoscope for both the timings (i.e.4h 56' 0511 and 5h 28'
0211 and cast the horoscope and use the Kunda method (one
